Per Agreement Of The Parties
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Fung-Yee Chan, Sarah Hebl, Pacific Women'S Obstetrics & Gynecology Medical'S Petition For Order To Compel Plaintiffs To Arbitrate Controversy And Stay Of Civil Proceeds On Behalf Of Defendants Fung Yee Chan Md Sarah S Hebl Md And Pacific Womens Obstetrics And Gynecology Medical Group Inc. Per Agreement Of The Parties.

Defendants' motion to compel arbitration and stay is GRANTED. No opposition filed.
Counsel for defendants is required to prepare and submit form or order that complies with CRC 3.1312 and repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
